scripts.dev: bun run dev:deps && trap 'kill 0' EXIT && bun --watch apps/server/src/index.ts & bun run --cwd apps/ui dev & bun run --cwd apps/docs dev --port 4321 & wait
scripts.dev:deps: docker compose up -d && printf 'Waiting for postgres' && until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U procella -q 2>/dev/null; do printf '.'; sleep 1; done && echo ' ready' && bun run db:migrate
scripts.check: biome check . && bun run lint:trpc-procedures && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit
scripts.lint:trpc-procedures: if grep -R -n -E --include='*.ts' 't\.procedure' packages/api/src/router/ apps/server/src/; then echo 'ERROR: use protectedProcedure or adminProcedure, not t.procedure'; exit 1; fi
scripts.test:security: bun test e2e/security-regressions/low-and-versions.test.ts packages/crypto/src/index.test.ts packages/auth/src/auth.test.ts packages/oidc/src/policy.test.ts packages/stacks/src/stacks.test.ts packages/config/src/config.test.ts apps/ui/src/utils/parsePort.test.ts apps/server/src/handlers/schemas.test.ts apps/server/src/middleware/decompress.test.ts apps/server/src/middleware/audit.test.ts
scripts.test:security:e2e: PROCELLA_SECURITY_E2E=1 CI=1 bun test --timeout 60000 --preload ./e2e/setup.ts e2e/security-regressions/ e2e/encrypt-decrypt.test.ts e2e/lease-token-binding.test.ts
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run e2e
